'''Gandl Vorkosigge''' was [[Chief Technical Proctor]] at the [[Carida Academy/Legends|Academy]] of [[Carida/Legends|Carida]]. Vorkosigge participated in the expulsion trial of [[Cadet/Legends|Cadet]] [[Mako Spince]].

{{Char-stub}}
